SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_ discernDocument - using the top portion of the document's content, discern the transaction's workflow (or fail if unable)

BRANCH.COMMENT: set sSql = SELECT ... based on what type of document we are dealing with also set node if the type is XML

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT * FROM TFW_DISCERN WHERE ACTING_ON = 'EDI' AND ENABLED = 'Y'

Values.value: SELECT * FROM TFW_DISCERN WHERE ACTING_ON = 'EDI' AND ENABLED = 'Y'

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT * FROM TFW_DISCERN WHERE ACTING_ON = 'XML' AND ENABLED = 'Y'

Values.value: SELECT * FROM TFW_DISCERN WHERE ACTING_ON = 'XML' AND ENABLED = 'Y'

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT * FROM TFW_DISCERN WHERE ACTING_ON = 'MIME' AND ENABLED = 'Y'

Values.value: SELECT * FROM TFW_DISCERN WHERE ACTING_ON = 'MIME' AND ENABLED = 'Y'

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT * FROM TFW_DISCERN WHERE ACTING_ON = 'EDIFACT' AND ENABLED = 'Y'

Values.value: SELECT * FROM TFW_DISCERN WHERE ACTING_ON = 'EDIFACT' AND ENABLED = 'Y'

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT * FROM TFW_DISCERN WHERE ACTING_ON NOT IN ( 'EDI','XML', 'MIME','EDIFACT') AND ENABLED = 'Y'

Values.value: SELECT * FROM TFW_DISCERN WHERE ACTING_ON NOT IN ( 'EDI','XML', 'MIME','EDIFACT') AND ENABLED = 'Y'

INVOKE.COMMENT: Retrieved %sRows% discernment records from TFW_DISCERN using %SQLStatement%

Values.value: Retrieved %sRows% discernment records from TFW_DISCERN using %SQLStatement%

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: we found a single discernment record, so return the workflowiid from that record

SEQUENCE.NAME: false
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: we could not find any discernment record, so fail

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0514 Could not determine a discernment record from input

Values.value: FE0514 Could not determine a discernment record from input

SEQUENCE.NAME: fail
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: we had some other error, most likely a discernment conflict of 2 records
